description:
You are an instructional coordinator sourcing Zero Textbook Cost (ZTC) materials for a Fall pilot program. Locate "Psychology 2e" (Social Sciences), "Calculus Volume 1" (Math), and "Microbiology" (Science) on OpenStax (https://openstax.org). Create a Firefox bookmark folder named "Fall Curriculum OER" containing the landing pages for these three books. Download the PDF version of "Psychology 2e" to ~/Downloads/ and create a curriculum metadata report at ~/Documents/oer_report.json containing the ISBN-13 (digital), license, and authors for all three books using the following JSON structure:

{
  "curriculum_pilot": "Fall 2024",
  "resources": [
